InventoryMovement.title: Inventory Movement
InventoryMovement.description: An audit log entry for any change in stock quantity, such as internal issuance or adjustments.

qty.description: The quantity moved. Positive for additions, negative for deductions.

LedgerEntry.title: Ledger Entry
LedgerEntry.description: A single debit or credit line item in the general ledger, forming an immutable audit trail.

reference.description: Link to the source document, e.g., PV Number or JV Number.

Theater.title: Theater
Theater.description: Represents an operating theater room within a hospital.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents a scheduled appointment for a patient with a doctor.

DoctorAvailability.title: Doctor Availability
DoctorAvailability.description: Defines the consultation schedule for a single doctor, including their working days, hours, and slot duration.

doctorId.description: The UID of the doctor this schedule belongs to.

slotDuration.description: The duration of each appointment slot in minutes.

GlobalAuditLog.title: Global Audit Log
GlobalAuditLog.description: Records a single, immutable event that occurred on the platform for security, financial, or system auditing by the App CEO.

type.description: The high-level category of the audited event.

action.description: A specific code for the action performed, e.g., 'IDENTITY_REPAIR', 'PRICE_ADJUSTMENT'.

hospitalId.description: The ID of the hospital tenant where the event occurred. 'SYSTEM' for platform-level actions.

actorId.description: The UID of the user who performed the action.

actorName.description: The display name of the user who performed the action.

details.description: A human-readable description of the event and its impact.

ipAddress.description: The IP address from which the request originated.

timestamp.description: The server timestamp when the log was created.

SmsLog.title: SMS Log
SmsLog.description: Records a single SMS message sent via the gateway for billing and auditing.

DeliveryLog.title: Delivery Log
DeliveryLog.description: Records the outcome of a single delivery for a specific maternity profile.

SpecialtySession.title: Specialty Session
SpecialtySession.description: A single, logged session for a recurring treatment plan, like Dialysis or Chemotherapy.

readings.description: Time-series readings from the procedural flowsheet.

TreatmentPlan.title: Treatment Plan
TreatmentPlan.description: Defines a recurring, cycle-based treatment plan for a patient in a specialty unit, such as Dialysis or Chemotherapy.

SpecialtyUnit.title: Specialty Unit
SpecialtyUnit.description: Represents a specialized care unit like Dialysis or Chemotherapy with a specific capacity.

MortalityRecord.title: Mortality Record
MortalityRecord.description: A global, anonymized record of a death event for epidemiological analysis.

MortalityArchiveRecord.title: Mortality Archive Record
MortalityArchiveRecord.description: A hospital-specific, identifiable record of a patient's death.

DisciplinaryRecord.title: Disciplinary Record
DisciplinaryRecord.description: A formal record of a disciplinary action taken against a staff member.

CpdSubmission.title: CPD Submission
CpdSubmission.description: A record of a single Continuous Professional Development submission by a staff member.

topic.description: Title of the training or event.

Appraisal.title: Appraisal
Appraisal.description: A single performance appraisal record for a staff member within a cycle.

AppraisalCycle.title: Appraisal Cycle
AppraisalCycle.description: Defines a specific time period for staff performance reviews.

Payer.title: Payer
Payer.description: Represents a third-party entity responsible for payment, such as an insurance company, corporate client, or the NHIA.

name.description: The official name of the paying entity.

contactPerson.description: The primary contact person at the payer's organization.

phone.description: Contact phone number for the payer.

creditLimit.description: The maximum amount of credit extended to this payer.

currentBalance.description: The current outstanding amount owed by this payer to the hospital.

Receivable.title: Receivable
Receivable.description: Represents an amount owed to the hospital by a patient or a third-party payer.

payerId.description: ID of the Payer entity, if institutional debt.

LeaveRequest.title: Leave Request
LeaveRequest.description: Records a staff member's request for leave.

PayrollRun.title: Payroll Run
PayrollRun.description: A record of a completed monthly payroll run for a hospital.

Payslip.title: Payslip
Payslip.description: A detailed breakdown of an individual employee's salary for a specific payroll run.

deductions.description: A list of recurring voluntary deductions from the salary.

label.description: Name of the deduction, e.g., GRNMA Dues.

SalaryProfile.title: Salary Profile
SalaryProfile.description: Defines the detailed salary structure for a single staff member, including basic pay, allowances, and deductions.

staffId.description: The UID of the staff member this profile belongs to.

basicSalary.description: The employee's monthly basic salary before allowances and deductions.

level.description: The employee's grade or level in the organization, e.g., Senior Nurse 1.

allowances.description: A list of additional, recurring payments.

label.description: Name of the allowance, e.g., Risk, Housing.

deductions.description: A list of recurring deductions from the salary.

label.description: Name of the deduction, e.g., GRNMA Dues.

BillingItem.title: Billing Item
BillingItem.description: Represents a single billable service or product for a patient before payment is collected by a cashier.

Requisition.title: Requisition
Requisition.description: Represents an internal request for supplies from one department to another (e.g., ward to pharmacy).

DisposalLog.title: Disposal Log
DisposalLog.description: Records the decommissioning of stock due to expiry, damage, etc.

ProductTemplate.title: Product Template
ProductTemplate.description: Represents a master record for a billable or stockable item in the hospital's catalog.

sku.description: Unique Stock Keeping Unit, generated automatically.

name.description: The official name of the product.

storeType.description: Which inventory this item belongs to.

unit.description: The base unit of measurement, e.g., Box, Bottle.

minLevel.description: The minimum stock level before a reorder alert is triggered.

basePrice.description: The cost price of the item from the supplier.

sellingPrice.description: The price billed to the patient for the item.

AccountsPayable.title: Accounts Payable
AccountsPayable.description: Represents a liability to a supplier, generated from a Goods Received Note.

GoodsReceivedNote.title: Goods Received Note
GoodsReceivedNote.description: A record of goods received from a supplier, often against a purchase order.

JournalEntry.title: Journal Entry
JournalEntry.description: A record of a manual double-entry transaction used for adjustments, accruals, and non-standard financial events.

narration.description: The detailed purpose of the journal entry.

type.description: The type or source of the journal entry.

lines.description: The individual debit and credit lines of the journal.

totalAmount.description: The total debit/credit amount of the journal.

createdBy.description: UID of the accountant who prepared the JV.

approvedBy.description: UID of the director/auditor who approved it (if needed).

ChartOfAccount.title: Chart of Account
ChartOfAccount.description: Represents a single account in the hospital's financial ledger.

parentAccountId.description: ID of the parent account for creating hierarchies.

isSystemAccount.description: Flag to protect system-critical accounts from deletion.

FixedAsset.title: Fixed Asset
FixedAsset.description: Represents a long-term tangible asset owned by the hospital, such as equipment, vehicles, or buildings, subject to depreciation.

usefulLife.description: The asset's useful life in years.

accumulatedDepreciation.description: The total accumulated depreciation for the asset.

lastDepreciationPeriod.description: Identifier for the last period depreciation was run (e.g., '2024-07').

PaymentVoucher.title: Payment Voucher
PaymentVoucher.description: Represents a single payment disbursement request, including statutory tax calculations.

debitAccountId.description: The ID of the account being debited (usually an expense or asset).

creditAccountId.description: The ID of the account being credited (usually a bank or cash account).

payee.description: The name of the vendor, staff, or entity being paid.

narration.description: The detailed purpose of the payment.

netAmount.description: The final amount payable after all calculations.

processedBy.description: UID of the accountant who prepared the PV.

approvedBy.description: UID of the director/auditor who approved it.

Shift.title: Shift
Shift.description: Defines a work shift pattern for staff attendance.

ClinicalAlert.title: Clinical Alert
ClinicalAlert.description: Represents a time-sensitive clinical alert, such as critical vitals, that requires immediate attention.

StaffAttendance.title: Staff Attendance
StaffAttendance.description: Records a single clock-in/clock-out event for a staff member.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Represents a single payment transaction for services rendered.

processedBy.description: UID of the cashier/accountant who processed the payment.

processedByName.description: Name of the staff member who processed the payment.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the claim was submitted to the scheme.

GeneralService.title: General Service
GeneralService.description: A billable service not tied to a specific clinical menu, like consultations or bed fees.

name.description: The name of the service (e.g., OPD Consultation).

category.description: A category for grouping, e.g., CONSULTATION, WARD.

price.description: Standard fee for the service in GHS.

Encounter.title: Encounter
Encounter.description: Represents a single clinical encounter or visit for a patient.

patientName.description: The patient's full name, denormalized for display.

chiefComplaint.description: The main reason the patient is seeking care.

diagnosis.description: The final diagnosis or clinical impression.

pulse.description: Pulse rate in beats per minute

respiration.description: Respiration rate in breaths per minute

ancDetails.description: Details specific to an Antenatal Care (ANC) visit.

fundalHeight.description: Height of the womb in centimeters.

fetalHeartRate.description: Fetal Heart Rate in beats per minute.

prescription.description: A list of prescribed medications for this encounter.

labOrders.description: A list of requested laboratory tests for this encounter. The full order details are stored in the `lab_orders` subcollection.

radiologyOrders.description: A list of requested imaging scans for this encounter. The full order details are stored in the `radiology_orders` subcollection.

isDispensed.description: True if the prescription for this encounter has been dispensed.

dispensedAt.description: Timestamp when the prescription was dispensed.

pharmacistId.description: The UID of the pharmacist who dispensed the order.

pharmacistName.description: The name of the pharmacist who dispensed the order.

hasPendingLabs.description: Flag to indicate if there are pending lab orders.

hasPendingScans.description: Flag to indicate if there are pending radiology scan orders.

RadiologyOrder.title: Radiology Order
RadiologyOrder.description: Represents a single, trackable imaging scan order for a patient.

price.description: The price of the scan at the time of order.

indication.description: The clinical reason for requesting the scan.

imageUrl.description: URL of the uploaded clinical image in Firebase Storage.

imageUploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the image was successfully uploaded.

LabOrder.title: Lab Order
LabOrder.description: Represents a single, trackable laboratory test order for a patient.

price.description: The price of the test at the time of order.

Hospital.title: Hospital
Hospital.description: Represents a single hospital tenant in the multi-tenant ERP system, managed by the App CEO.

hospitalId.description: Unique identifier for the Hospital entity. This serves as the 'hospitalId' for multi-tenancy.

name.description: The official, full name of the hospital.

region.description: The region in Ghana where the hospital is located.

directorUid.description: The Firebase UID of the user who is the director of this hospital.

directorEmail.description: The email address of the hospital's director.

status.description: The current operational status of the hospital tenant.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the hospital record was initially created.

trialExpiry.description: The date when the hospital's trial period expires.

mrnPrefix.description: The custom prefix for Medical Record Numbers for this hospital.

subscriptionPlan.description: The ID of the pricing plan this hospital is subscribed to.

isSuspended.description: A flag to manually suspend access for this hospital.

patientCounter.description: The current counter for generating unique patient EHR numbers.

nextBillingDate.description: The date when the next subscription payment is due.

subscriptionStatus.description: The current billing status of the hospital's subscription.

gracePeriodExpiry.description: The exact time when the grace period for a late payment ends.

bypassPaymentControl.description: A CEO override to bypass all automated billing and suspension logic for this facility.

lastPaymentRef.description: The reference of the last successful Paystack transaction.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the GAM_Med system. This entity stores profile and role information, linked to an external authentication system via its ID.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the User entity, matching the Firebase Authentication User ID (UID).

hospitalId.description: Reference to the Hospital this user belongs to. Null for global roles like 'AppCEO'.

email.description: The user's primary email address, used for login and notifications.

hospitalName.description: The name of the hospital the user belongs to, stored for easy display.

is_active.description: Whether the user account is active.

onboardingComplete.description: Flag to indicate if the user has completed their profile details.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account record was created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account record was last updated.

totalCpdPoints.description: The cumulative number of verified CPD points for the staff member.

licenseExpiry.description: The expiry date of the staff member's professional license (MDC/NMC).

contractType.description: Specifies whether the staff is permanent or a freelance locum.

Patient.title: Patient
Patient.description: Represents a patient managed by a specific hospital, identified by Ghana Card/NHIS ID, and linked to their Electronic Health Records.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Patient entity.

hospitalId.description: Reference to the Hospital under which this patient is registered.

ehrNumber.description: The unique Electronic Health Record number for the patient within the hospital (e.g., KATH-00001).

otherNames.description: The patient's other or middle names.

ghanaCardId.description: The patient's Ghana Card ID, used for national identification.

nhisNumber.description: The patient's National Health Insurance Scheme number.

emergencyContactName.description: Full name of the patient's next of kin or emergency contact.

emergencyContactPhone.description: Phone number of the patient's emergency contact.

status.description: The patient's current status in the system.

registeredBy.description: The UID of the staff member who registered the patient.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the patient record was created in the system.

checkInTime.description: Timestamp when the patient was last checked in to the OPD queue.

isLocked.description: A flag to permanently lock the record from further clinical edits upon death certification.

deathInfo.description: Stores details of the patient's death certification.

PharmacyItem.title: Pharmacy Item
PharmacyItem.description: Represents a single drug or item in a hospital's pharmacy inventory.

sku.description: SKU from the master product catalog.

name.description: The brand or trade name of the drug.

batchNumber.description: The batch or lot number of the drug stock.

Supplier.title: Supplier
Supplier.description: Represents a vendor for drugs and consumables.

tin.description: Tax Identification Number for GRA compliance.

PurchaseOrder.title: Purchase Order
PurchaseOrder.description: A record of an order placed with a supplier.

closeReason.description: Reason for manually closing a partially fulfilled PO.

closedAt.description: Timestamp when the PO was force closed.

closedBy.description: UID of the user who force closed the PO.

LabTest.title: Lab Test
LabTest.description: Represents a single laboratory test available in a hospital's menu.

name.description: The name of the test (e.g., Full Blood Count).

price.description: Price of the test in GHS.

referenceRange.description: The normal range for the test results.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the test result (e.g., mg/dL).

RadiologyScan.title: Radiology Scan
RadiologyScan.description: Represents a single imaging scan available in a hospital's menu.

name.description: The name of the scan (e.g., Chest X-Ray PA View).

price.description: Price of the scan in GHS.

Procedure.title: Procedure
Procedure.description: Represents a billable clinical procedure available at a hospital.

name.description: The name of the procedure (e.g., Suturing of Laceration).

price.description: Standard service fee for the procedure in GHS.

ProcedureLog.title: Procedure Log
ProcedureLog.description: Records a clinical procedure performed on a patient, including consumables used.

MaternityProfile.title: Maternity Profile
MaternityProfile.description: Represents a single longitudinal pregnancy record for a patient, tracking them from enrollment to post-natal care.

enrolledBy.description: UID of the staff member who enrolled the patient.

edd.description: Expected Date of Delivery, calculated from LMP.

gravida.description: Total number of pregnancies, including the current one.

para.description: Number of births past 20 weeks gestation.

Ward.title: Ward
Ward.description: Represents a clinical ward within a hospital, containing multiple beds.

Bed.title: Bed
Bed.description: Represents a single bed within a ward.

Admission.title: Admission
Admission.description: Represents a single inpatient admission record for a patient.

admittedBy.description: UID of the staff who processed the admission.

dischargedBy.description: UID of the staff member who processed the discharge.

dischargeSummary.description: The final clinical summary written upon patient discharge.

NursingRound.title: Nursing Round
NursingRound.description: Represents a single nursing round or check-in for an admitted patient.

medicationsAdministered.description: Text describing drugs given during this round.

NursingHandover.title: Nursing Handover
NursingHandover.description: A record of a shift change report, detailing patient status, admissions, discharges, and critical notes for continuity of care.

criticalPatients.description: Notes on patients requiring special attention.

consumablesNotes.description: Status of essential supplies like oxygen.

generalIncident.description: Report of any general incidents during the shift.

nurseId.description: UID of the nurse submitting the report.

PlatformConfig.title: Platform Config
PlatformConfig.description: Tracks global, company-wide KPIs and configuration for the entire GAM_Med platform.

totalFacilities.description: Total number of active hospital tenants.

totalPatients.description: Total number of patients across all hospitals.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last KPI update.

Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: Represents a potential customer or demo request submitted through the platform.

contactName.description: Name of the person making the inquiry.

phone.description: Contact phone number for the lead.

hospitalName.description: Name of the hospital or clinic interested.

mrnPrefix.description: The custom prefix for Medical Record Numbers requested by the lead.

status.description: The current status of the lead.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the lead was submitted.

PricingPlan.title: Pricing Plan
PricingPlan.description: Defines a specific pricing tier for the GAM_Med SaaS offering.

id.description: The unique identifier for the plan (e.g., 'CLINIC', 'PRO').

name.description: The display name of the pricing plan.

price.description: The display price of the plan, including currency (e.g., 'GHS 500').

monthlyPrice.description: The monthly subscription price in GHS.

annualPrice.description: The annual subscription price in GHS.

description.description: A short description of the plan, suitable for a pricing page.

isPopular.description: A flag to mark a plan as 'popular' to highlight it in the UI.

maxStaff.description: The maximum number of staff users allowed under this plan.

maxPatients.description: The maximum number of patients allowed under this plan.

features.description: A list of features included in this plan.

PayrollConfig.title: Payroll Configuration
PayrollConfig.description: Stores the statutory payroll configuration for a hospital, including SSNIT rates and PAYE tax brackets, as per Ghanaian law.

ssnitEmployeeRate.description: The percentage of an employee's basic salary contributed to SSNIT by the employee.

ssnitEmployerRate.description: The percentage of an employee's basic salary contributed to SSNIT by the employer.

tier2Rate.description: The percentage for the Tier 2 private pension scheme, typically part of the employer's contribution.

payeBrackets.description: The graduated tax brackets for Pay As You Earn (PAYE) as defined by the Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA).

upTo.description: The upper limit of the income bracket.

rate.description: The tax rate for this bracket.

definition.description: Logs all movements of stock for auditing.
Immutable log of all financial transactions for audit purposes.
Stores records for scheduled surgical procedures.
Global collection for all patient appointments.
Stores the weekly consultation availability for each doctor. Document ID is the doctor's UID.
Immutable, CEO-only audit trail of all significant platform events.
Global log of all SMS messages sent through the platform for billing and auditing purposes. Writable only by backend functions.
Master list of all accounts for all facilities. Document ID is a composite key: {hospitalId}_{accountCode}.
Master list of all product definitions across all facilities.
Manages operating theater rooms.
Stores cycle-based treatment plans for specialty care.
Stores individual session logs for a treatment plan.
Manages specialized, recurring care units like Dialysis or Chemotherapy centers.
Global, anonymized log of all patient mortalities for epidemiological analysis by the CEO.
A hospital-specific, identifiable record of a patient's death.
Stores all formal disciplinary actions against staff.
Manages performance review cycles.
Stores individual staff appraisal results.
Stores all CPD submissions from staff for verification.
Manages the master list of third-party payers (insurance, corporate) for accounts receivable.
Tracks all outstanding debts owed to the hospital.
Tracks all staff leave requests and their approval status.
Stores summary records of each completed payroll run.
Stores individual payslips generated for each staff member during a payroll run.
Stores the detailed salary compensation profile for each staff member.
A centralized ledger of all individual, unpaid services and products for patients. This is the primary source for generating invoices.
Immutable audit trail of all decommissioned or wasted stock.
Manages internal supply requisitions between departments.
Master catalog of all products and supplies for a hospital to ensure data consistency.
Master register for all hospital fixed assets for financial tracking and depreciation.
Tracks liabilities owed to suppliers from Goods Received Notes.
Logs all goods received events, creating an auditable trail for inventory updates.
Global collection for platform-wide KPIs. Contains a single 'summary' document.
Collection for sales leads and demo requests submitted through the public website.
Global collection defining the SaaS pricing tiers (e.g., CLINIC, PRO). Writable by SUPER_ADMIN, readable by all.
Top-level collection for all user profiles. A user's role and hospitalId (if applicable) are stored here, enabling role-based access control checks in security rules via `get()` calls.
Root collection for all hospital tenants. Managed globally by the App CEO.
Subcollection for managing general billable services like consultation fees or ward rates.
A collection of critical alerts that require immediate staff attention.
Collection for all expenditure payment vouchers, requiring approval before disbursement.
Collection for all manual double-entry journal vouchers for financial adjustments.
Collection for storing shift handover reports from nurses.
Subcollection for patient records, scoped to a specific hospital. Access is controlled by checking the calling user's profile from the `/users` collection to verify their `hospitalId` and `role`.
Subcollection for all clinical encounters (visits, vitals, etc.) for a single patient.
Subcollection for all of a patient's pregnancy records. A new document is created for each new pregnancy.
Records the outcome of a single delivery.
Subcollection for managing drug inventory within a specific hospital. Writable by Pharmacists and Directors.
Subcollection for managing the list of approved vendors and suppliers.
Subcollection for managing purchase orders to suppliers.
Subcollection for managing the menu of laboratory tests offered by a specific hospital. Writable by Directors and Lab Managers.
Subcollection for all individual laboratory test orders within a hospital.
Subcollection for managing the menu of imaging scans offered by a specific hospital. Writable by Directors and Radiologists.
Subcollection for managing the menu of billable clinical procedures. Writable by Directors and Admins.
Subcollection for all individual imaging scan orders within a hospital.
Subcollection for logs of all clinical procedures performed.
Subcollection for managing hospital wards. Writable by Directors and Admins.
Subcollection for beds within a specific ward. Writable by clinical and admin staff.
Subcollection for all inpatient admission records within a hospital.
Subcollection for all nursing rounds for a single admission.
Collection for all payment receipts and transactions within a hospital.
Subcollection for managing staff work shifts and duty rosters.
Logs for all staff clock-in and clock-out events.
A singleton document containing the payroll statutory configuration for the hospital.

firestore.reasoning:
This Firestore data structure supports multi-tenancy and role-based access control (RBAC) without relying on custom claims, which cannot be managed from a client-only application. 

1.  **Role Management via User Profiles:** Instead of custom claims, a user's role and `hospitalId` are stored in a document in a top-level `/users/{userId}` collection. This allows for centralized user management.

2.  **Server-Side Role Verification:** Security rules will use `get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid))` to fetch the calling user's profile document. This allows the rules to securely check the user's `role` and `hospitalId` on the server before granting access to data, enforcing multi-tenancy and RBAC.

3.  **Global Admin Role:** A global 'AppCEO' role is managed via an existence check in the `/app_ceos/{appCeoId}` collection. This provides a secure entry point for system administration without requiring special claims.

4.  **Data Segregation:** Hospital-specific data, like patients, remains nested under `/hospitals/{hospitalId}`. This organizes data logically by tenant, even though authorization is decoupled and centralized in the `/users` collection.
